message:
🐛 Pin kubebuilder-release-tools to commit hash (#53)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - name: Verifier action
         id: verifier
-        uses: kubernetes-sigs/kubebuilder-release-tools@v0.4.3
+        uses: kubernetes-sigs/kubebuilder-release-tools@012269a88fa4c034a0acf1ba84c26b195c0dbab4 # v0.4.3
         continue-on-error: true
         with:
           github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
